issues.summary: Local action links render bare <li> items outside a <ul>
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  List item does not have a <ul>, <ol> parent element
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: • …
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/content
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "listitem" on selector: .action-links-item
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: "Select all rows" checkbox is labeled only by its title attribute
issues.selector: input[title="Select all rows in this table"]
issues.html_snippet: <input type="checkbox" class="form-checkbox form-boolean form-boolean--type-checkbox" title="Select all rows in this table">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix all of the following:
  Only title used to generate label for form element
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: Checkbox has a visible or visually-hidden <label>, or aria-label
issues.actual_behaviour: input[title="Select all rows in this table"] — title is the sole label source
issues.suggested_fix:
Replace the title-only label with aria-label:

<!-- Before (broken) -->
<input type="checkbox" title="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">

<!-- After (fixed) -->
<input type="checkbox"
  aria-label="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/content
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "label-title-only" on selector: input[title="Select all rows in this table"]
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: "No blocks in this region" placeholder text fails contrast (2.84:1, needs 4.5:1)
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.84 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
issues.expected_behaviour: Foreground color #767676 or darker on white (#ffffff) background → 4.54:1
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/structure/block
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "color-contrast" on selector: .region-hero-message > td[colspan="5"] > em
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Breadcrumb links are only 14px tall — WCAG 2.5.8 requires 24×24px minimum
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Target has insufficient size (102.3px by 14px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 17.6px instead of at least 24px.
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: Clickable area ≥ 24×24px (WCAG 2.5.8 AA)
issues.actual_behaviour: Breadcrumb links: 14px height, insufficient spacing from neighbours
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/config/content/formats/manage/restricted_html
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "target-size" on selector: a[href$="admin"]
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Local task tab headings (#primary-tabs-title) are outside any landmark region
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: The <h2> heading is inside the <nav> it labels, or the <nav> itself is inside a landmark
issues.actual_behaviour: <h2 id="primary-tabs-title"> is a sibling of <nav>, and the nav may be outside main/aside/etc.
issues.suggested_fix:
Move the heading inside the
it labels: {# Before #}

{{ 'Primary tabs'|t }}

…
{# After — h2 moves inside nav #}

{{ 'Primary tabs'|t }}

…
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/user/login
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "region" on selector: #primary-tabs-title
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Primary admin actions block is rendered outside any ARIA landmark
issues.html_snippet: • Add content
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks
issues.expected_behaviour: Block content is inside a <main>, <nav>, <aside>, or equivalent landmark
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/content
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "region" on selector: #block-olivero-primary-admin-actions > .block__content
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Status messages block uses role="contentinfo", duplicating the page <footer>
issues.html_snippet: <div class="messages-list__item messages messages--error" data-drupal-selector="messages" role="contentinfo" aria-label="Error message" data-once="messages">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one contentinfo landmark
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: Status messages use role="status" (non-error) or role="alert" (errors)
issues.actual_behaviour: <div role="contentinfo" aria-labelledby="…"> — conflicts with the page footer landmark
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/appearance
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "landmark-no-duplicate-contentinfo" on selector: .messages-list__item
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Homepage has no <h1> heading — screen reader users cannot identify page topic
issues.failure_summary:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.drupal_file:
core/themes/olivero/templates/layout/page--front.html.twig
    Site configuration (site name / front page node)
issues.expected_behaviour: Every page contains exactly one <h1> that identifies the page
issues.actual_behaviour: Olivero front page renders no <h1>; the site name in the header is not an <h1>
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "page-has-heading-one" on selector: html
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Admin Configuration page has heading-order violations (h3 appears before h2)
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Heading order invalid
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: Heading levels increment by one: h1 → h2 → h3
issues.actual_behaviour: Panel titles use <h3> but their section headings may be absent or at wrong level
issues.suggested_fix:
Audit the heading hierarchy on /admin/config and adjust panel titles: {# system-admin-index.html.twig — ensure section uses h2, panel uses h3 #}

{{ section.title }}

{{ panel.title }}
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/config
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "heading-order" on selector: .layout-column.layout-column--half:nth-child(2) > .panel:nth-child(1) > .panel__title
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js
